name_en: Gare du Midi / Brussels South Station

phrases.text_local: Où est le quai pour l'Eurostar vers Londres ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh kay poor luh-yur-oh-STAR vair lon-DRUH
phrases.cultural_note: Eurostar departs from Platform 1. Direct service to London St Pancras takes 1 hour 50 minutes. Arrive 30 minutes before departure.

responses.english: The Eurostar platform is at level -1. Follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: luh KAY uhr-oh-STAR eh oh nee-VOH mwahn uhn. swee-VAY lay pah-NOH
responses.french: Le quai Eurostar est au niveau -1. Suivez les panneaux.

phrases.cultural_note: Thalys connects Brussels to Paris (1h 15m), Amsterdam (1h 55m), and Cologne. Tickets are cheaper booked in advance.

responses.english: Thalys trains depart from the central platforms. Check the departure screen.
responses.phonetic: lay trahn tah-LEES part day KAY sahn-TROH. vay-ree-fee-AY lay-KRAHN day day-PAR
responses.french: Les trains Thalys partent des quais centraux. Vérifiez l'écran des départs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the currency exchange office
phrases.text_local: Où est le bureau de change ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh buh-ROO duh shonzh
phrases.cultural_note: Change offices are in the main hall. Airport-style exchange rates are poor — use ATMs for better rates.

responses.english: In the main hall, near the ticket offices.
responses.phonetic: dahn luh OL prahn-see-PAL, preh day gee-SHAY
responses.french: Dans le hall principal, près des guichets.

phrases.text_local: Où est la station de taxis ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah stah-SYOHN duh tak-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis wait outside the main entrance on Avenue Fonsny. Uber is also available but may not be cheaper.

responses.english: The taxi stand is just outside the main exit.
responses.phonetic: lah stah-SYON duh tak-SEE eh zhoost ah lah sor-TEE preen-see-PAL
responses.french: La station de taxis est juste à la sortie principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about metro connection to center
phrases.text_local: Comment aller au centre en métro ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MON ah-LAY oh sontr on may-TROH
phrases.cultural_note: Metro lines 2, 3, and 6 connect Midi to central Brussels (e.g., Gare Centrale, De Brouckère). A single ticket costs €2.10.

responses.english: To get to the center by metro, take lines 2, 3, or 6. A ticket costs €2.10.
responses.phonetic: luh პრო-shan day-PAR eh byan-TOH, ruh-gar-DAY luh pah-NOH
responses.french: Pour aller au centre en métro, prenez les lignes 2, 3 ou 6. Un ticket coûte 2,10 euros.
